item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Rapid Rehousing Funding Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Rapid Rehousing Funding

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Rapid Rehousing funding expansion in the 119th Congress, addressing the documented shortage of rapid-rehousing capacity in nearly every metropolitan Continuum of Care (CoC).

What does it actually do?

  • HUD Continuum of Care rapid-rehousing funding expansion
  • Move-in assistance + short-to-medium-term rental subsidy
  • Case-management funding for rehousing transitions
  • Family-with-children prioritization
  • Veterans rapid-rehousing parallel funding stream

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #1 Lets Make Dinner Homeless Help Solution (cooperative-class composing layer for federal homelessness response), Save-the-World Paper 3 (Universal Cooperative Shelter), and #5 The Family Table Trust Graph for rehousing-recipient family-network reconnection.

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Veterans Homelessness Prevention Act
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Veterans Homelessness Prevention

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Veterans homelessness prevention legislation in the 119th Congress, building on HUD-VASH (HUD Veterans Affairs Supportive Housing) and SSVF (Supportive Services for Veteran Families) programs.

What does it actually do?

  • HUD-VASH voucher expansion
  • SSVF funding stabilization
  • Veteran-specific rapid-rehousing capacity
  • Prevention-side intervention for at-risk veterans
  • Family-of-veteran inclusive provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #1 Lets Make Dinner Homeless Help Solution, Veteran Crisis Line Expansion Bounty Poster, Veterans Auto-Education Improvement Bounty Poster, and the cooperative’s veteran-Crown Council anchors (Wahlberg, Cena, Sinise, Sam Elliott, Hanks, The Rock).
